reason: Far-tier ranged/volley attrition rules (LOD phase 2 follow-up) are representational, same as phase 2 itself (#557, PR #577): the rate/reach rules are unit-tested in isolation (FarTierRules/FarTierFormation), and nothing in Battle orchestrates a live far-tier-vs-far-tier fight during play yet, so no recorded battle can show the change. It becomes observable once far-tier formations actually fight in a live scenario (phase 5, #560).
